Bus Timings

F20 Bus Timings Business Bay Metro Seaside to Falcon House

July 10, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus F20 is a vital public transportation service in Dubai, offering seamless connectivity between Business Bay Metro Seaside and Falcon House. It provides convenient access to various neighborhoods, schools, and key landmarks, making it a popular choice for those navigating this dynamic area.

Route Name F20
Route Description Business Bay Metro Seaside - Falcon House - Business Bay Metro Seaside
Total Distance Approximately 60 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 53 minutes
Operational Hours 04:16 to 00:35 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus F20

Bus F20 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus F20 operates with regular intervals throughout the day, ensuring frequent service for passengers. Below are the bus timings for each direction:

From Business Bay Metro Seaside From Falcon House

Bus F20 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to access the F20 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus F20 is affordable and consistent with Dubai’s public transportation pricing structure. The standard rate is AED 3 for a single zone. For the most accurate fare details, it’s best to check the current rates through the RTA Dubai app or inquire at any metro station.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus F20 does not offer an online booking option. For real-time updates on bus timings and service status, you can use the RTA Dubai app or website, which provides live tracking and schedule information. Additionally, the app allows you to plan your route and check the nearest bus stops, making it a valuable tool for travelers.

Bus Route

The Bus F20 route covers the following stops:

  1. Business Bay Metro Seaside

  2. Emarat Headquarters, Street 35

  3. Al Ittihad Health Center

  4. Street 35A

  5. Dar Al Ber Society

  6. Ferdous Building

  7. Al Safa 1, Street 19, Jumeirah College

  8. Al Safa, Street 8B, Private School

  9. Al Razi Boys School

  10. Al Safa, Street 13A

  11. Onpassive Metro Seaside

  12. Wasl, Road 5

  13. Falcon House

  14. Wasl, Rawdhat Al Abrar Mosque

  15. Wasl, Road 4

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Spinneys

  2. Shoping Center

  3. Ferdous Building

  4. Box Park 2

  5. Dar Al Ber Society

  6. Street 35A

  7. Al Ittihad Health Center

  8. Emarat Headquarters, Street 35

  9. Business Bay Metro Seaside

The route loops from Business Bay Metro Seaside to Falcon House and back, ensuring comprehensive coverage of the area.

Bus F20 Station Overview

Business Bay Metro Seaside

The Business Bay Metro Seaside station is a key transit hub situated in Dubai’s bustling Business Bay district where Bus Routes 7, 9, 14, 91, and F20 converge. This station connects directly to the Dubai Metro, providing seamless access to the city’s extensive metro network.

As a stop for Bus F20, it offers convenient transfer options for passengers traveling within Business Bay and to other major destinations across Dubai. The station is equipped with modern amenities, including digital displays for real-time updates, making it a vital stop for both professionals and visitors in the area.

Falcon House

The Falcon House bus stop is located in a vibrant area known for its commercial and residential developments. Serving as a stop for Bus F20, it provides essential connectivity to various local and city-wide destinations. This station is strategically positioned to serve nearby businesses and residential communities, offering a practical option for daily commuters and travelers. Its well-maintained facilities ensure a comfortable and efficient transit experience.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

There are several notable attractions and destinations along the Bus F20 route: 1.

2.

3.

  1. Spinneys Shopping Center: A popular supermarket chain in Dubai, Spinneys is located in Wasl and is convenient for grocery shopping and dining.

  2. It offers a variety of retail and food options in a vibrant setting.

6.

These locations offer a mix of modern urban experiences, shopping, dining, and local community services, making Bus F20 a route with a diverse range of points of interest.

Journey Experience

The trip concludes at Falcon House, located in a quieter business district. Despite its length, the F20 route provides a rich experience of both Dubai’s glamorous side and its cultural heart, making it an interesting and rewarding ride for both locals and visitors.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can easily travel to Falcon House, the furthest point on the F20 bus route, starting from Business Bay Metro Seaside. The journey offers a comfortable and convenient ride, with fares ranging between AED 107 and AED 130, ensuring a reliable option for reaching your destination. Whether you’re heading to work or exploring the area, Careem provides a seamless travel experience to one of Dubai’s notable landmarks.

This comprehensive guide aims to help you navigate Bus F20 efficiently, ensuring a smooth and convenient travel experience across Dubai. By providing detailed route information and timely schedules, it enables you to plan your trips with ease and confidence. Whether you’re commuting to work or exploring the city, Bus F20 offers a reliable and accessible option for your travel needs.

  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
